title: rubus × linkianus
intro: Rubus × linkianus, also known as Japanese raspberry or Link's raspberry, is a hybrid plant species within the Rubus genus, combining characteristics of both Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × linkianus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
